This is a password pool, including x entries. Each of the entry is of the <Password, Count, Popularity> form.
Note that, the term "Count" stands for the popular count of the corresponding password. For example, if the 
password "12345" occurs 79076 times in the entire 32 million Rockyou dataset, we say the popular count of
password "12345" is 79076. Accordingly, the "Popularity" of password "12345" is 79076/(total count in 
the current pool=79076/162724=0.485952.
*/
